title: The Birdcage Covers Dressrosa
description: Pages 11–15 focus on the birdcage covers dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Sabo, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Doflamingo as doflamingo traps Dressrosa inside the Birdcage and turns the entire kingdom into a survival game with bounties on his enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Anyway. The first Lucy was a 400 million bounty head...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Oh, and he's my little brother!! Nice to meet you!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...and the man who's going to be pirate King someday...!! Straw hat Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A pirate?!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: revolutionary army warrior HACK

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: revolutionary army - Chief of Staff SABO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're the Revo- Lutionsary Army........!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Luffy's a pretty swell guy, isn't he? He hasn't changed a bit.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: What are the Revoli- Tionary Army doing in this country...?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The weapons shipped from this port are supporting wars around the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're here to put a stop to it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The Revolu- Tionary army...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: ...have sent soldiers into this country many times in the past...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...but because they were all turned into toys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...We haven't been able to expose this black market until now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Whoa, Whoa, this guy's trouble!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: That's SABO, isn't it?! What's the number 2 of the revolution- any army doing here?!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: We have to tell the young master!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...but it looks like the actual "production" of the weapons is taking place elsewhere.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Where are they being sourced from........?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If we could just find that out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...it would make a fine present to take back to dragon-san...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The Royal Palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Aghh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Nguaa- AHH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: You one-legged bastard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: How dare you kill the young master!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Oin- Guah- Hi!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Buffalo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Tra- Dude!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I'm here to save you!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: It's great to see you're alive!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You shouldn't have any business here, straw hat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: What of the factory?!! Have you destroyed it?!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Here's the key to his hand- cuffs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You really are well- prepared!! It's like you can see the future!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hold it, straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Violet!!! I won't let you harm the young...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Young Master?!

summary: The Birdcage Covers Dressrosa develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Sabo, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
